heading: Petition and review
label: 6008 Petition and review
notes: References in TextThe Federal Rules of Civil Procedure, referred to in subsec. (b)(2), are set out in the Appendix to Title 28, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.

children.label: A
children.text: stating that the plan, any provision of the plan, or any obligation imposed in connection with the plan is not in accordance with law; and

children.label: B
children.text: requesting a modification of the plan or an exemption from the plan.

children.heading: Hearings
children.label: 2 Hearings
children.text: The petitioner shall be given the opportunity for a hearing on the petition, on the record and in accordance with regulations issued by the Secretary.

children.heading: Ruling
children.label: 3 Ruling
children.text: After such hearing, the Secretary shall make a ruling on the petition, which shall be final if in accordance with law.

children.heading: Commencement of action
children.label: 1 Commencement of action
children.text: The district courts of the United States in any district in which a person who is a petitioner under subsection (a) resides or carries on business are hereby vested with jurisdiction to review the ruling on such person’s petition, if a complaint for that purpose is filed within 20 days after the date of the entry of a ruling by the Secretary under subsection (a).

children.heading: Process
children.label: 2 Process
children.text: Service of process in such proceedings shall be conducted in accordance with the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure.

children.label: A
children.text: to make such ruling as the court shall determine to be in accordance with law; or

children.label: B
children.text: to take such further proceedings as, in the opinion of the court, the law requires.

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: 4 Enforcement
children.text: The pendency of proceedings instituted under subsection (a) shall not impede, hinder, or delay the Attorney General or the Secretary from taking any action under .section 6009 of this title
